overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a vehicle driving through Night City at dusk. The journey begins in an industrial district, transitions onto Highway 101, passes a massive cylindrical holographic billboard, and ends with a stop at a red light in an industrial area.

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through industrial streets approaching the highway entrance

entered.detail: large yellow industrial crane with red warning lights
low-rise transit station with illuminated windows
wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: Driving through an industrial district at dusk, passing a yellow construction crane and a metro station building. The camera approaches a highway entrance with a tall glass tower marked '04' visible in the background against the orange sky.

events.description: entering highway 101 overpass from city street
accelerating to highway speed after entering the overpass

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto the elevated highway overpass with increasing speed

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: overhead gantry sign displaying Highway 101 in red LED
elevated highway ramp with concrete supports
metal safety barriers along the highway edge

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters Highway 101 and accelerates along an elevated overpass. The highway sign is visible overhead as the camera moves away from the industrial district into a more open urban highway environment with the glass tower now visible to the left.

events.description: approaching and passing the large cylindrical holographic billboard structure
turning right at intersection near the billboard

agents.ego_description: driving past a massive cylindrical holographic billboard and executing a right turn at the intersection

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk near the billboard

entered.detail: massive rotating cylindrical structure displaying neon advertisements and holographic images
tall corporate skyscraper with Arasaka logo visible at the top
low-rise industrial buildings with corrugated metal facades

segments.scene_description: Driving past a prominent cylindrical holographic billboard displaying rotating neon advertisements, with the Arasaka tower visible in the distance. The vehicle turns right at an intersection into an industrial area with warehouse buildings.

events.description: turning left onto industrial road with construction cranes visible
stopping at red traffic light at intersection with crosswalk

agents.ego_description: driving through industrial streets, turning left, and coming to a complete stop at a red traffic light

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street at the crosswalk in front of the vehicle

entered.detail: dark industrial building with metal fencing and concrete walls
yellow construction cranes silhouetted against the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: Navigating through an industrial district with construction cranes and warehouse buildings, making a left turn, and coming to a stop at a red traffic light where pedestrians are crossing the street. The lighting grows darker as evening sets in.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape that transitions from a gritty industrial district to a high-speed highway before returning to a darkening urban zone. It begins by passing a yellow construction crane and a metro station under an orange dusk sky, moving toward a highway entrance with a tall glass tower looming in the background. As the vehicle accelerates onto the elevated Highway 101, the environment opens up, leaving the industrial buildings behind while the glass tower shifts to the left of the frame. The scene then glides past a massive cylindrical holographic billboard with rotating neon advertisements and a distant view of the Arasaka tower before turning right into a warehouse district. Finally, the camera navigates through a cluster of construction cranes and warehouses, making a left turn to come to a stop at a red traffic light as the evening light fades into darkness.
